description:
Update attributes on a generic tool item response. 
For more information on Generic Tool and Correspondence Tool endpoints, 
see [Working with the Correspondence Tool](/documentation/tutorial-correspondence).

parameters.name: generic_tool_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the generic tool

parameters.name: generic_tool_item_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the generic tool item

created_at.description: Generic Tool Item Response created at

official.description: If the response is an Official Response

status.description: Status of the Generic Tool Item Response

official.description: If this property is set ot true, the response is an official response. If this property is set to false, the response is not an official response.
